title: Chemistry Olympiad Competitor
description: National and international chemistry olympiad participation
story: Competed in chemistry olympiads, developing a deep foundation in advanced chemical principles and problem-solving that would shape my scientific journey.

title: Copper-Doped Zeolites for Methane Mitigation
description: Experimental research on zeolite catalysts for greenhouse gas reduction
story: Joined the Plata Lab at MIT to investigate copper-doped zeolites as catalysts for methane oxidation, driven by a desire to apply chemistry to combat climate change.

title: MOF-Based Membranes for Solvent Separation
description: Sustainable membrane technology using metal-organic frameworks
story: Moved to the Smith Lab at MIT to engineer MOF-based membranes for industrial solvent separation, continuing my focus on chemistry for sustainability and green processes.

title: MOFs for Electrochemical CO₂ Reduction
description: Porous framework materials as electrocatalysts for carbon capture
story: Joined Professor Camille Petit's group at Imperial College London to explore MOFs as electrocatalysts for CO₂ reduction, bridging materials chemistry and climate solutions.

title: Machine Learning Prediction of Drug Solubility
description: ML models for predicting aqueous solubility of pharmaceutical compounds
story: Began my pivot to computational chemistry by developing machine learning models to predict drug solubility, combining my chemistry background with data-driven approaches for the first time.

title: ML-Driven MOF Discovery
description: Accelerating metal-organic framework design using machine learning
story: Collaborated with Heather Kulik's group at MIT to apply ML to high-throughput MOF screening, uniting my experimental materials chemistry experience with computational methods.

title: ML for Materials Discovery — Industry Internship
description: Applied machine learning to accelerate functional materials discovery
story: Took an industry internship deploying ML pipelines for materials discovery, gaining experience translating academic research methods into scalable, real-world applications.

title: ML for Drug Discovery with the Coley Group
description: Machine learning approaches to automated drug discovery at MIT
story: Joined Connor Coley's group at MIT to work on ML-driven drug discovery, applying graph neural networks and generative models to navigate vast chemical spaces for therapeutic candidates.

title: Generative ML for Small Molecule Discovery
description: Deep generative models for de novo small molecule design
story: Pushed the frontier of computational drug discovery by developing generative ML architectures for de novo small molecule design, synthesizing everything I had learned across experimental and computational chemistry.
